title: BitFun LAN Monitor
subtitle: Monitor desktop sessions from a browser on the same network
invalidUrl: This LAN monitor URL is invalid or has expired.
pairingRejected: The desktop rejected this pairing request.
notPaired: The LAN monitor is not paired.
invalidResponse: The desktop returned an invalid monitor response.
noSessions: No sessions in the current workspace
selectSession: Select a session to view its conversation
connectionLost: The desktop monitor stopped or pairing expired.
